title: delegation — retention windows
description: Two distinct retention tracks. RoleDelegation is 730-day hot then hard-purged (soft-deleted rows only — active/expired stay indefinitely until manually revoked or the tenant is erased). ImpersonationSession is 7-year hot AND NEVER HARD-DELETED (compliance evidence retention — SOC 2 Type II requires impersonation evidence for the entire audit window plus one year). The session_token_hash column IS scrubbed after 30 days but the row is preserved.
compliance_regimes_referenced: SOC 2 Type II CC6.1 (Logical + Physical Access Controls) — impersonation actor audit for entire audit window
SOC 2 Type II CC6.7 (Data Transmission Restriction) — evidence of privileged access is preserved for compliance review
PCI-DSS 8.5 (Do Not Use Group / Shared / Generic Accounts / Passwords) — impersonation notice + audit is the compensating control
GDPR Art. 5(1)(e) (Storage Limitation) — role delegations governed by legitimate interest, purged at 730d
GDPR Art. 17(3)(e) (Right to Erasure exception — legal claims defence) — impersonation audit stream retained through User erasure

purge.trigger: deleted_at + 730 days AND revoked_at IS NOT NULL

purge.action: hard delete via FK cascade (target_tenant_id CASCADE)

hot.note: 7 years — SOC 2 Type II compliance evidence retention

purge.trigger: NEVER purged automatically. Row is preserved for compliance evidence retention indefinitely.
purge.action: hard delete via FK cascade (target_tenant_id CASCADE) ONLY on tenancy::TenantErased. Otherwise no automatic hard-delete.

supplementary_action.trigger: session_token_hash IS NOT NULL AND ended_at + 30 days
supplementary_action.action: UPDATE session_token_hash = NULL — the token is dead anyway; scrubbing removes hash residue

purge.trigger: manual — via compliance-team review process only
purge.action: N/A — never automatic. Compliance evidence retention outlives everything except manual review-driven purge.

cross_plane_note: ImpersonationSession rows uniquely SURVIVE the impersonator's PlatformUser hard-delete (which happens 90 days after offboarding per platform-user/retention.json). This is achieved via `impersonator_platform_user_id ON DELETE SET NULL` + the immutable snapshot columns (`impersonator_display_name` + `impersonator_department`). Compliance evidence readers reconstruct operator identity from the snapshot fields when the FK is NULL. See schemas/impersonation-session.schema.json + observers.json.
audit_stream_separation_note: The DEDICATED audit trail written by HasAudit's compliance-audit table (not activity_log) is on ITS OWN retention path (7 years) and is NOT purged by tenancy::TenantErased — compliance evidence outlives the tenant it references, per SOC 2 evidence-retention requirements. The impersonation_sessions row itself IS on the tenant cascade — but the audit stream isn't.
